notes: FROZEN (daemon_capability: incapable). kiro ships a real blocking plan-approval gate — /plan switches to the built-in kiro_planner agent, and switch_to_execution presents a y/n approve picker (agent_supports: yes) — but it produces no daemon-observable waiting episode: switch_to_execution is absent from the global user-blocking tool list (only AskUserQuestion/ExitPlanMode/question), kiro has no hook system so PermissionPending never fires, the kirocli parser has no waiting branch, and the y/n approval is a TUI overlay with no JSONL event. No waiting→approve arc reaches the transport, so no phases are asserted. Recording would capture an ordinary working arc that never enters waiting. The kiro JSONL also carries no model/token/cost (sidecar only), hence the unknown/false observation vector.
